title: Splunk Enterprise Security Flaw
summary: [P1] A critical security flaw has been found in Splunk Enterprise, which could be exploited to conduct unauthenticated file operations. The vulnerability has not been exploited in the wild, but a patch is available. Why now: The vulnerability has been recently disclosed and a patch is available. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: The vulnerability allows for arbitrary code execution, which is a characteristic of rce.
